text: Patient: John Smith, DOB: 15/03/1978, MRN: 1234567, Male. Presenting complaint: chest pain radiating to left arm for 3 hours. Allergies: Penicillin (anaphylaxis), Aspirin (GI intolerance).
A 65-year-old female patient (ID: P-9876543) with a history of type 2 diabetes mellitus and hypertension was admitted for elective coronary angiography.

Neonate, male, 2 days old. Birth weight 3.4 kg. Born at 38+2 weeks gestation by elective C-section to Ms. Thompson (mother, DOB 14/07/1990). Apgar scores 8/9.
